🚀 START HERE - Launch Dashboard

Welcome! Everything you need for your grand opening campaign is in this folder.

Quick Start (30 Seconds)

  1. Open index.html in your browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, etc.)
  2. Click "Read the How-To Guide" at the top (or skip to step 3)
  3. Check today's priority task - do that ONE thing
  4. Bookmark this page for daily access

That's it! You're ready to go.

What's in This Folder

launch-dashboard/
├── START-HERE.md                ← You are here!
│
├── index.html                   ← Main dashboard (open this first!)
├── how-to-use.html             ← Complete guide (click from dashboard)
│
├── week-by-week.html           ← All 4 weeks of daily tasks
├── modular-plan.html           ← Marketing modules (keep/skip)
├── progress.html               ← Progress tracker
├── quick-ref.html              ← Contacts, dates, checklists
│
├── poc-sheets.html             ← Google Sheets integration (optional)
├── google-apps-script.js       ← Backend for Sheets sync
│
├── README.md                   ← Dashboard overview
├── SETUP-GOOGLE-SHEETS.md      ← Sync setup guide (optional)
└── FILE-STRUCTURE.md           ← Complete file organization

Three Ways to Use This

Option 1: Digital Dashboard (Easiest) ⭐

  • Open index.html daily in browser
  • Check today's task, click through sections
  • Works on phone, tablet, laptop
  • Best for: Quick access, no printing needed

Option 2: Print & Check Off (Classic) 📄

  • Print week-by-week.html one week at a time
  • Put on fridge, mark with pen
  • Print next week when done
  • Best for: Visual reminders, low-tech approach

Option 3: Google Sheets Sync (Advanced) 🔄

  • Follow SETUP-GOOGLE-SHEETS.md (15 min setup)
  • Open poc-sheets.html on all devices
  • Real-time sync across phone/laptop/tablet
  • Best for: Cross-device collaboration with Emily & Michael

Your Daily Routine

Every Morning (2 minutes):

  1. Open index.html
  2. Check "Today's Priority"
  3. Do that task
  4. Done!

Every Sunday (15 minutes):

  1. Review upcoming week
  2. Send Sunday email (6-8pm)
  3. Check what's coming
  4. Feel prepared!

Important Links From Dashboard

From the main dashboard (index.html), you can access:

  • 📖 How-To Guide - Banner at top + floating ❓ button
  • 📅 Week-by-Week - Daily tasks for all 4 weeks
  • 🎯 Modular Plan - Keep/skip marketing initiatives
  • 📊 Progress Tracker - Checkbox lists + metrics
  • 📞 Quick Reference - Contacts, dates, checklists

Need Help?

First Time Using This?

  1. Open index.html
  2. Click "Read the How-To Guide" in the gold banner
  3. Follow the Quick Start section

Want Cross-Device Sync?

  1. Try the demo: Open poc-sheets.html → Click "Load Demo"
  2. If you like it: Read SETUP-GOOGLE-SHEETS.md
  3. Takes 15 minutes, works forever

Feeling Overwhelmed?

  1. Open index.html
  2. Click "Modular Plan"
  3. Skip anything that feels like too much
  4. Focus on bare minimum: Emails + Website fix + Grand opening

Technical Issues?

  • Check FILE-STRUCTURE.md for file locations
  • Make sure you're opening from launch-dashboard/ folder
  • Try refreshing browser (Cmd+R or Ctrl+R)
  • Send message to Claude with screenshot

Key Dates

  • Nov 10, 17, 24: Email Sundays (6-8pm)
  • Nov 21 (Thu): Pre-orders launch (optional)
  • Nov 28 (Fri): VIP Soft Opening 4-7pm (optional)
  • Nov 29 (Sat): GRAND OPENING 10am-6pm 🎉
  • Nov 30 (Sun): Thank you email + rest!

The Bare Minimum (If Overwhelmed)

Only do these THREE things:

  1. Email Campaign - Your 100+ subscribers (2-3 hours)
  2. Website Hero Image - Convert to WebP (45 min)
  3. Grand Opening Day - Show up & be amazing (8-10 hours)

Everything else is optional! You can still have a successful opening with just these.

Why This Folder is Self-Contained

Everything you need is here:

  • ✅ No external dependencies (except email/Instagram)
  • ✅ Works offline (except Google Sheets option)
  • ✅ Printable or digital - your choice
  • ✅ Mobile-friendly responsive design
  • ✅ All linked together - no broken links

You can:

  • Email this folder to Emily/Michael
  • Put it on Google Drive/Dropbox
  • Use on any device with a browser
  • Host on your website
  • Print everything if you want

Success Tips

  1. Start small: One task per day adds up to 25 tasks by opening!
  2. Bookmark the dashboard: Quick access every day
  3. Use Quick Reference often: All your contacts in one place
  4. Celebrate wins: Checked off a task? That's progress!
  5. Adjust as needed: Falling behind? Skip something, no guilt!

Your Competitive Advantages

Remember why you're doing this:

  • ✨ Cleveland's FIRST & ONLY children's bookstore
  • ✨ Emily's expertise - teacher + mom of 4
  • ✨ Perfect timing - Small Business Saturday
  • ✨ Engaged audience - 100+ email subscribers
  • ✨ Beautiful space - Hand-curated selection

You're creating something special. This dashboard just helps you get there!

Next Step: Do This Now

Click to open: index.html

Or from command line:

open index.html

Or from Windows:

start index.html

Then: Read the gold banner and click "Read the How-To Guide"

Questions?

If anything isn't working or you need something different:

  • Check the "How-To Guide" first (click from dashboard)
  • Read README.md for technical overview
  • Read FILE-STRUCTURE.md for file organization
  • Message Claude with what you need

You've got this! 🎉

25 days until grand opening. One task at a time, you'll get there.

The Wandering Lantern "Follow the light, find the wonder"

📚✨ Open index.html to begin! ✨📚
